text: There is a peculiar sense of silence here, as if the world has briefly paused at the end of an experience. The first image shows an empty, spacious room with soft lighting and a sense of abandonment, almost as if the space is awaiting the next moment or encounter. The second image, bursting with color and information, evokes a feeling of curiosity and contemplation. I am simultaneously drawn to the quiet potential of emptiness and the lively promise of knowledge and invention. This juxtaposition makes me reflect on the thresholds between endings and beginnings, presence and memory, silence and inquiry. I feel contemplative and open, as though the world is gently inviting me to step into whatever comes next.
